race.description: Intellifleet Pty Ltd Country Boosted Hcp (C1)
race.comment: IROQUAI (10) smart mare who will relish the fast tempo after scoring a barnstorming win when coming from last on the turn at Albury over 1175m. Drops in trip and can progress further now. FIRE CHAT (2) starting to hit his straps and rewarded for his consistency with a slick on-pace Maiden win over 1200m at this track last time. Poorly drawn for this but has the ratings to take a hand in the finish. UNICORN DREAMING (9) on the quick back-up with a surprise 3 len win over 1000m at Gundagai. Showed a ton of speed on that occasion and can get cover here from the awkward gate. UNDER WRAPS (4) was below his best last time when ninth over 1000m at Albury after a win here over this trip two back. Can atone.
